name: Deli Star Corp.
description: Specializing in fresh, never-frozen protein solutions, delivering extended shelf life and an unmatched food safety record. Through culinary innovation, efficient manufacturing, and a resilient supply chain, Deli Star is trusted to meet the evolving needs of the B2B food industry.

name: Danish Crown
description: Danish Crown is actively working to revolutionize the beef industry by aiming to halve its climate footprint by 2030, implementing sustainable practices from farming to transportation and processing.

name: ABS Global
description: The company has established a strong presence in the bovine genetics industry through innovative products like the Sexcel® sexed genetics and ABS Beef InFocus™, which provides reliable beef genetics. Their focus on genetic improvement and efficiency aims to enhance calf crop value and optimize the beef supply chain.

name: Fancy Foods Inc.
description: Fancy Foods Inc is a distributor of protein food products, including beef, serving the Retail, Wholesale, and Foodservice sectors in the NY, NJ, and Connecticut markets. The company emphasizes health-conscious options and offers a variety of both branded and private label products.

name: AdvancePierre Foods
description: The company offers a variety of high-quality beef products from renowned brands, catering to different culinary needs.

name: Baldor Specialty Foods Inc.
description: Baldor Specialty Foods offers a selection of beef as part of their extensive collection of fresh produce and specialty foods. They pride themselves on delivering high-quality products to meet their customers' needs.

name: Liffey Meats
description: Liffey Meats is a prominent producer of premium Irish beef products, such as steak haché, hamburgers, and meatballs, sourced from Angus and Hereford cattle.

name: Scotbeef Limited
description: Scotbeef is a family-owned business with over 100 years of experience in supplying high-quality beef products to the UK retail sector and export markets. They are committed to sustainable procurement, ensuring that all beef meets the highest industry standards, and they offer a diverse range of award-winning beef and lamb products.

name: Vestey Foods International Ltd
description: Vestey Foods International is a trading company that specializes in sourcing and distributing quality meat products, including beef. With a global network and strong relationships with suppliers, they ensure a diverse range of high-quality food products.

name: American Foods Group
description: American Foods Group emphasizes its commitment to high-quality beef production, hand-selecting superior cuts to ensure exceptional standards. They provide a diverse range of beef products suitable for various foodservice operations.
